The Custom Fight-stick

I play the fighting game "Persona 4 Arena Ultimax" competitively, and needed a fight-stick that worked on both Xbox360 and PS3, so I designed and built this:

I had never done any woodworking before, but a family friend had both the tools and experience to help guide me through the making of the box. I would estimate that we each did about half of the work, as I was too invested in the result to allow myself to do the crucial/detailed cuts.

The electrical components were ordered from focusattack.com, which I mounted and wired myself.

The art on the top is the character I play, Labrys, which I burned onto a 1/4" piece of wood using pyrography. If I take out the buttons and remove the joystick ball-top, this panel can be removed/replaced, allowing the art to be interchangeable.

Website designed and developed by Alan Robison
